name: Kerlyn Angel Difo
title: Software Engineer
bio: CS student at CUNY Queens College. Interning at Google working on the Data Corruption Monitoring Team. Learning about backend systems, distributed infrastructure, and developer tooling.
aboutDescription: CS major at CUNY Queens College (class of '27). I'm a board member at Code For All with over 2k members and build projects to scratch my own itches. When I'm not coding I'm usually playing league of legends.
aboutTagline: to live intensely is a privelege
onTheShelf: The Infinity Machine by Sebastian Mallaby
